name: First State Bank
description_short: Wrens, GA branch of First State Bank located at 300 E Broad St provides banking services to the community.
description_long:
First State Bank's branch at 300 E Broad St brings full-service banking to downtown Wrens, GA. Located in the heart of the Wrens community, this branch provides convenient access to banking services for residents and local businesses. Current branch hours are available by contacting the location directly or visiting the website.

This Wrens banking branch offers a range of standard services including deposits, account management, and financial assistance. Whether you're opening an account, making deposits, or seeking banking solutions, the staff at this location is ready to help. For details on specific services available at the Wrens branch, contact First State Bank directly.

When you visit First State Bank in Wrens, bring a valid government ID and any relevant account documentation. The branch serves the Wrens community with personalized banking support and reliable financial services. Stop by 300 E Broad St to experience convenient banking in your community.
services: Community Plus Checking and Basic Checking accounts
Commercial Checking and Commercial Interest Checking
Savings accounts and Christmas Club savings accounts
Personal loans and Personal Term Loans
Business loans and Business Lines of Credit
Card Suite Lite debit card control and management
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full U.S. government faith and credit
50+ years of specialized agricultural lending experience and relationships
Free mobile banking apps for iOS and Android with instant account access
Card Suite Lite provides debit card control features (on/off, transaction limits, location controls)
Tiered-interest Community Plus Checking account designed to earn interest
Multiple branch locations across central Georgia (Wrens, Louisville, Americus, Warrenton, Harlem)
Comprehensive loan products including mortgages, personal, auto, business, and agricultural loans
cons: Limited fee transparency on website—no accessible fee schedule details provided in content
Website lacks specific information on interest rates, APRs, or CD terms to compare competitively
No mention of minimum balance requirements, account opening incentives, or promotional rates
Geographic limitation to central Georgia may not serve customers outside service areas
Limited detail on loan approval timelines, processing times, or online application options
best_for: Agricultural business owners and farmers seeking specialized lending and long-term relationships
Georgia residents in Wrens, Louisville, Americus, Warrenton, or Harlem areas preferring local branch banking
Customers seeking FDIC-insured deposit products with mobile banking convenience
Small business owners needing commercial checking, business loans, and merchant services
diagnosis: First State Bank is best for depositors and borrowers in central Georgia seeking traditional community banking with FDIC insurance, agricultural lending expertise, and digital convenience through mobile apps. The main caveat is limited online transparency regarding rates, fees, and loan terms, requiring direct contact with the bank for specific pricing and competitiveness assessment.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: First State Bank at 300 E Broad St, Wrens, GA. Full-service banking for the community.
